info.description: AI Agent Platform API - Skill marketplace, organization and repository management.
info.title: Costrict Web API

get.description: Get pending experience candidates awaiting review

post.description: Trigger automatic pattern analysis for all items with recent activity

get.description: Get details of a specific experience candidate

post.description: Approve and promote an experience candidate to item metadata
Reject an experience candidate
Upload a file artifact for a skill item

delete.description: Delete an artifact by ID and remove its stored file

get.description: Download a file artifact by ID
Exchange OAuth authorization code for access token

post.description: Invalidate current session

get.description: Get information of the authenticated user
Get all skill items visible to the current user with pagination

post.description: Create a skill item; auto-selects public registry if registryId is omitted

get.description: Get all skill items owned by a user
Get skill item by ID with registry, versions and artifacts

put.description: Update skill item by ID; creates a new version if content changes

post.description: Analyze an existing skill and get improvement suggestions
Run pattern analysis on behavior logs for a specific item

get.description: Get all artifacts for a skill item

post.description: Log a user interaction with a capability item

get.description: Download the Markdown content of a capability item (skill/subagent/command) as a file. Respects visibility rules.

post.description: Apply suggested improvements to a skill

get.description: Get the history of experience promotions for a specific item
get.summary: Get promotion history for an item

get.description: Find items similar to a given item using vector similarity
Get behavior statistics for a specific item
Get all versions of a skill item
Get a specific version of a skill item

post.description: Generate a skill definition based on a natural language prompt
Search using both semantic similarity and keyword matching

get.description: Get recently added high-quality items

post.description: Get personalized skill recommendations using multiple strategies
Search for capability items using semantic similarity

get.description: Get trending items based on recent activity
Get all organizations

post.description: Create a new organization. Set orgType=sync to create a Git-synced organization.

get.description: Get all organizations the user belongs to
Get organization by ID
Get all members of an organization

post.description: Add a user to an organization

delete.description: Remove a user from an organization

get.description: Get the internal capability registry for an organization

post.description: Manually trigger a sync job for the organization's registry

get.description: Get registries visible to the current user (public + org + personal)

post.description: Create a new skill registry
Get or create the personal registry for a user

get.description: Get all registries owned by a user
Get the global public skill registry
Get registry by ID with its items
Get all items in a registry

post.description: Create a new skill item in a specific registry

get.description: Probe whether a registry requires authentication. Returns {"public":false} for non-existent orgs to avoid leaking org existence.
Return the index.json for an org's registry, filtered by the caller's access rights. Requires Bearer token for non-public registries.
Download a specific file of an item identified by org/slug/filename. Respects visibility rules.
get.summary: Download registry item file by slug

get.description: Get a summary of user's behavior and preferences

post.description: Receive GitHub push events and enqueue sync jobs

frequency.description: How many times this pattern occurred

resolution.description: How it was resolved / what was learned

sourceLogId.description: Reference to behavior log if applicable

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
